SELECT
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT min_consumption FROM seg_min WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        MIN(cc.total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM (
        SELECT
            CustomerID,
            SUM(Consumption) AS total_consumption
        FROM yearmonth
        WHERE substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
        GROUP BY CustomerID
    ) cc
    JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = cc.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY c.Segment
) seg_min;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT Segment,
       pct_increase
FROM (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption END) AS cons_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) AS cons_2013,
        (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) -
         SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption END)) AS increase,
        CASE
            WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) != 0
            THEN (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) -
                  SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption END)) *
                 100.0 /
                 SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption END)
        END AS pct_increase
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
) calc
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM calc)
   OR pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM calc);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

    WITH race AS (
        SELECT raceId
        FROM races
        WHERE year = 2008
          AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
    ),
    champ AS (
        SELECT r.time
        FROM results r
        JOIN race ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
        WHERE r.position = 1
          AND r.time IS NOT NULL
        LIMIT 1
    ),
    last AS (
        SELECT r.time
        FROM results r
        JOIN race ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
        WHERE r.time IS NOT NULL
        ORDER BY r.position DESC
        LIMIT 1
    ),
    times AS (
        SELECT
            (CAST(substr(champ.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600 +
             CAST(substr(champ.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60 +
             CAST(substr(champ.time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER)) * 1000 +
             CAST(substr(champ.time, 10, 3) AS INTEGER) AS champ_ms,
            (CAST(substr(last.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600 +
             CAST(substr(last.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60 +
             CAST(substr(last.time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER)) * 1000 +
             CAST(substr(last.time, 10, 3) AS INTEGER) AS last_ms
        FROM champ, last
    )
    SELECT champ_ms, last_ms FROM times
);	----- bird -----	formula_1
